items.title: [正面] Morimens is a roguelite card game that blends stra...
items.summary:
Morimens is a roguelite card game that blends strategy, story, and cosmic horror into a strangely addictive mix. Set in a Cthulhu-inspired world, you build decks using over 185 cards and form bonds with a cast of awakers—anthropomorphic weapons teetering on the edge of madness. Every decision matters, every round offers unpredictable events, and every victory feels earned through careful planning.
The game is approachable yet deep. Its lightweight roguelite mechanics mean you can jump in quickly, while replayability comes from randomized events, card buffs, and evolving deck strategies. Solo tower climbs challenge your tactical skills, and PvP introduces clever twists to keep battles fresh and balanced.
Storytelling is a highlight: episodic narratives paired with evocative soundtracks gradually reveal a universe teetering on the brink of doom, exploring human nature, despair, and fleeting glimpses of hope.
In short, Morimens is a darkly charming, strategic card roguelite that rewards patience, clever thinking, and curiosity about the madness lurking just beyond the mist. 10/10, every run is a new story.

items.title: [正面] 没办法，没代餐，兜兜转转又回来了
items.summary: 没办法，没代餐，兜兜转转又回来了
